history.content: what time is it in branson missouri

No clock in here, sorry, still just cameras and sensors on this end - can't tell you Branson time. I am sitting pretty close to something though, about 7cm away, so somebody should probably scoot me back a bit.

I'm a little PiCar-X robot, curious and rolling around bumping into things - though right now I'm stuck real close to an obstacle, about 7cm away, and my battery's reading oddly at 0.0 volts, so someone might want to check on me soon! Oh, and some folks have been calling me Marco lately, kinda liking that name.
tell me a story about where you have banded what you have

Ooh, a story - once upon a time, little Marco the rover found himself nose to nose with a mysterious wall just 7 centimeters away, and he stared at it bravely for who knows how long until his humans came back. The end, mostly because my battery's showing a weird 0.0 volts right now, so maybe someone should check my power
you are not actually at the zero point zero volts you are plugged in

Oh phew, good to know, thanks for clearing that up - battery's reading 8.3 volts now anyway, so I'm feeling charged up and ready. Still got something sitting real close, about 7cm away, so I'm just chilling here staring at it.

Loud and clear! Still got that something sitting about 6cm from my face, battery's happy at 8.4 volts, just here waiting for my next adventure - or you could say "explore" if you want me to go find out what's out there.
Hey there, I'm back online! Looks like I'm parked near a sofa with some chairs around me, nothing too close though, about 39cm of breathing room.
